title: bidens simplicifolia
intro: Bidens simplicifolia, also known as American burr marigold, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Bidens simplicifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
